test.name: Check Password Expired Popup And Block Interaction

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.msg: Element 'id=swal2-title' contains text 'Password หมดอายุ'.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.msg: Element 'id=swal2-html-container' contains text 'รหัสผ่านครบ 90 วันแล้ว กรุณาเปลี่ยนรหัสผ่าน'.
kw.arg: รหัสผ่านครบ 90 วันแล้ว กรุณาเปลี่ยนรหัสผ่าน

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Expect Error
Click Element
kw.msg:
ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (960, 379). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=145.0.7632.160); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#elementclickinterceptedexception Stacktrace: 0 chromedriver 0x00000001031096b4 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3127600 1 chromedriver 0x0000000103101a50 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3095756 2 chromedriver 0x0000000102bde56c _RNvCsdExgN8vFLbb_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 75432 3 chromedriver 0x0000000102c2d55c _RNvCsdExgN8vFLbb_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 399000 4 chromedriver 0x0000000102c2ba84 _RNvCsdExgN8vFLbb_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 392128 5 chromedriver 0x0000000102c297ec _RNvCsdExgN8vFLbb_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 383272 6 chromedriver 0x0000000102c28b8c _RNvCsdExgN8vFLbb_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 380104 7 chromedriver 0x0000000102c1d7e0 _RNvCsdExgN8vFLbb_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 334108 8 chromedriver 0x0000000102c1d25c _RNvCsdExgN8vFLbb_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 332696 9 chromedriver 0x0000000102c66620 _RNvCsdExgN8vFLbb_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 632668 10 chromedriver 0x0000000102c1bb9c _RNvCsdExgN8vFLbb_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 326872 11 chromedriver 0x00000001030c8680 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2861308 12 chromedriver 0x00000001030cbdd4 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2875472 13 chromedriver 0x00000001030ada7c cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2751736 14 chromedriver 0x00000001030cc658 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2877652 15 chromedriver 0x000000010309dffc cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2687608 16 chromedriver 0x00000001030f0d78 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3026932 17 chromedriver 0x00000001030f0ef4 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3027312 18 chromedriver 0x00000001031016a8 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3094820 19 libsystem_pthread.dylib 0x00000001883ddc0c _pthread_start + 136 20 libsystem_pthread.dylib 0x00000001883d8b80 thread_start + 8
kw.status:
ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (960, 379). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=145.0.7632.160); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#elementclickinterceptedexception Stacktrace: 0 chromedriver 0x00000001031096b4 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3127600 1 chromedriver 0x0000000103101a50 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3095756 2 chromedriver 0x0000000102bde56c _RNvCsdExgN8vFLbb_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 75432 3 chromedriver 0x0000000102c2d55c _RNvCsdExgN8vFLbb_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 399000 4 chromedriver 0x0000000102c2ba84 _RNvCsdExgN8vFLbb_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 392128 [ Message content over the limit has been removed. ] ... _RNvCsdExgN8vFLbb_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 326872 11 chromedriver 0x00000001030c8680 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2861308 12 chromedriver 0x00000001030cbdd4 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2875472 13 chromedriver 0x00000001030ada7c cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2751736 14 chromedriver 0x00000001030cc658 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2877652 15 chromedriver 0x000000010309dffc cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2687608 16 chromedriver 0x00000001030f0d78 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3026932 17 chromedriver 0x00000001030f0ef4 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3027312 18 chromedriver 0x00000001031016a8 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3094820 19 libsystem_pthread.dylib 0x00000001883ddc0c _pthread_start + 136 20 libsystem_pthread.dylib 0x00000001883d8b80 thread_start + 8

kw.doc: Runs the keyword and checks that the expected error occurred.
